nasb.text: Now you are cursed from the ground, which has opened its mouth to receive your brother’s blood from your hand.

esv.text: And now you are cursed from the ground, which has opened its mouth to receive your brother’s blood from your hand.

cnv.text: 地開了口，從你手裡接受了你弟弟的血，現在你要從這地受咒詛。

ccb.text: 地张开口从你手上接受了你弟弟的血，你在地上必受咒诅。

csbs.text: 地张开了口，从你的手中接受了你弟弟的血，所以你现在要从这地受诅咒：
